entry.title: MSC 2026 Esports World Cup: Format, schedule, results, and more
entry.summary: Here is a complete guide to MSC 2026 at the Esports World Cup, including match results, schedules, and key information.

entry.title: All Fortnite Season start and end dates
entry.summary: Here is a list of every start and end date for all of Fortnite's chapters and seasons.

entry.title: Hans Jagnow on Paris, politics, and building fandom across 24 games at the Esports World Cup
entry.summary: Esports Foundation's Hans Jagnow talks about the Esports World Cup's relocation, the changing perception of esports, and esports fandom.

entry.title: Street Fighter 6 LCQ at the EWC 2026: Tough matches to enter the biggest stage
entry.summary: It’s an LCQ, alright, but the possibility of advancing to the main Esports World Cup 2026 (EWC 2026) event makes it a totally stacked and extremely

entry.title: Old-school Masteries are back in League Classic!
entry.summary: The Offense, Defense, and Utility Mastery Trees are back! Here's everything you need to know about Masteries in League Classic.

entry.title: Risk without reward: Counter-Strike 2's new sticker system threatens the entire esports scene's structure
entry.summary: Valve just made some big changes to the sticker system, causing Counter-Strike 2 teams to lose a ton of revenue. This could spell trouble.

entry.title: FLCN Hadji ecstatic to be back in the international stage in MSC at EWC 2026: "I really miss this feeling."
entry.summary: Hadji shares his excitement as he returns to the international stage. Here are his thoughts on the MSC at EWC 2026.

entry.title: Forget the burrito bowl: Karmine Corp's Blue Rising TCG is the future of esports monetization
entry.summary: Sick of the boring slapped on logos and lazy sponsored social media posts? Karmine Corp is showing how esports can truly thrive.

entry.title: Lich Queen Mei rises in new Overwatch x World of Warcraft collaboration!
entry.summary: The legendary Lich Queen Mei skin and Frostmourne Ana weapon have entered Overwatch as part of the game's latest World of Warcraft crossover.

entry.title: Faker named Youth Cyber Gambling Awareness Ambassador by Korean National Police Agency
entry.summary: Faker will front a nationwide campaign in South Korea, encouraging young people struggling with cyber gambling to seek help.

entry.title: BlizzCon 2026 bundles bring new skins, mounts, and more to your favorite Blizzard games
entry.summary: Here's everything to know about the BlizzCon Ultimate Collection and new digital bundles! We also go over what to expect at BlizzCon 2026 itself.

entry.title: Huanmie talks TFT Space Gods Tactician's Crown: "I still believe I'm one of the most dominant TFT players in the world."
entry.summary: Huanmie won the TFT Space Gods Tactician's Crown. Here's what he said about his victory plus his advice to players who wish to start their own TFT esports journey.

entry.title: Single-player games deserve more attention in esports
entry.summary: League of Legends and Counter-Strike 2 seem to get all the love, but single-player games deserve way more attention.

entry.title: I am not convinced that hunting for AI is going to solve esports' biggest issues
entry.summary: With Mobile Legends: Bang Bang recently accused of having AI in its menu, I got to thinking: Who cares really? Is it impacting esports?

entry.title: Fatal Fury: City of the Wolves has an insane DLC schedule, but it may not be enough to bring the sauce
entry.summary: Fatal Fury: City of the Wolves devs are going ham with the DLC, dropping tons of characters. But do they have the sauce?

entry.title: South American Dota 2 just got dealt one of its worst blows yet after PlayTime's scandal at the Esports World Cup
entry.summary: South American Dota 2 just got dealt one of its worst blows in God knows how long after PlayTime's EWC elimination.

entry.title: Top Stories Archives - Esports Insider
entry.summary: A newly-added rule states that what you say to your own teammates is no longer off-limits to TOs. Will this stop trash talking?

entry.title: Latest News Archives - Esports Insider
entry.summary: Lenovo's marketing leads explain why the Legion Go and Rollable concept matter more than brand impressions — and how they pitch esports spend to the CFO

entry.title: Games Archives - Esports Insider
entry.summary: VALORANT took a massive hit in the viewership department compared to last year. Is the esports scene dying?

entry.title: News Archives
